mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_category WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, name, description, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_category WHERE name = #{name} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, name, description, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_category WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_category (id, name, description, create_name, create_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{createName}, #{createId})
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_category SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_category WHERE name = #{name} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_category WHERE name = #{name} AND id != #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
